title: 日本ダービーの後に・希望の灯光

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First place goes to Narita Top Road! She's earned
the honor of becoming a Derby champion!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I think that was a first?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You were staring right at me, and you looked...
frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I'm sure of it now. You'll be even stronger
at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I won't be slacking off though! I'll keep training
during summer camp. I'll focus on stamina as much
as I can!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: This time, at the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(But my body feels oddly light, like a balloon
drifting away after the string was cut...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Almost like... I could start running again, at this
very moment.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The final race of the Classic Triple Crown is next...
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it'll be like today.
